titleStmt.title: SII 7.368: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer

No. 368. (A.R. No. 168-B of 1901). ON A SLAB LYING IN THE COMPOUND OF THE OLD JAINA BASTI OPPOSITE THE SOMANATHESVARA TEMPLE AT THE SAME VILLAGE. The positions of this and other inscriptions not included in the Annual Report on Epigraphy could not be checked, as they are not marked on the impressions or wrappers. The situations given here are those entered in the preliminary transcripts.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīvītarāgāya namaḥ . namastuṁgaśirastuṁbicaṁdracāmara
cāravē . trayilokyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī . ja
yādbhudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1375 saṁda varttamāna śrīmukhasaṁvatsara
māgha śu 10 bu lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa mallikārju
namahārāyaru vijenāgarada siṁhvāsanadalu sukhasāṁbrajyava nāḷuva kāladalu Ā
vara mahāpradhāna siṁgappadaṇāyakara nirūpadiṁda bārakkurarājyavanu dēmaṁṇnavoḍe
yaru pratipālisuva kāladalu maṇigāṟakkēryya śrīsōmanāthadēvarigu Adiparamēśvarari
gū dhammakke biṭṭu barasi koṭṭa śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare . pūrvvadalli virupanadaṇāyka
ru baḷuguḷada śrīmaccārukīrtipaṁḍitadēvaĀyyagaḷige sarvvamānyavāgi biṭa Aṟavaṁ
ṭeya haravariya darmmastaḷavanu suṭṭu brāhmaṇanu Aḷida saṁmaṁdadiṁda Ā dēmaṁṇna
voḍeyaru sōmanāthadēvara pātrabhōgake Adiparamēśvarara hāladhārege biṭṭadu mughu vi
nevoḷage keḷakoppariyaUru Āramanege teṟuva kuḷāgrada ga 11 modalavoḷage sōmanā
thadēvarige ga 5 . ho(ṁ)nnu Ādiparamēśvararige ga 5 . hoṁnu yī haṁnoṁdu hoṁnige
baṁda kuḷāgrada teṟina hoṁnanu śrīsōmanāthadēvarigū Ādiparamēśvararigū Āca
ṁdrārkka naḍavaṁtāgi biṭṭu barasikoṭṭa śilāśāsanakke dēmaṇṇavoḍeyara voppa karaṇika sā
ypagaḷa baraha mughuvinaUru hadinālkumaṁdi jaṁnnigaḷa voppa . hāradavaḷiyali
kaṁdeya beḷivoḷage Adidēvarige janni śivaṁṇināykaru Ātana taṁma yīśvarasēnabōva ma
ga dēvaṁṇṇasēnabōva mūvaroppi biḍāruvāravāgi biṭṭa bāḷa gaḍiya vivara mūḍalu yetti
da Agaḷu teṁka hoḷanakki teṁgina kaṁṭa paḍuva yettida Agaḷu baḍagaḷu heddāri yi nālku
gaḍiyoḷaguḷa bāḷa vivara Adiya gade mu 7 koḷakeya gade mu 6 naṁja mu 5 baṁka mu 1 .
haraḷa mu 1 . mēlu baṁka mu 1 . māvina gade mu 2 hāḷi mu 1 Āṁka gadde mu 1 yi ga
yoḷaguḷa makki meke mane kaḷa bāvi yiṣṭanu biḍāruvāravāgi biṭṭu kaḍaṁgoṁḍa ho
50 yī bāḷa mēle naḍava Ākki mu 41 ke teṟu dēvasva kaḷaci naḍava Akki mu 18 mē
ge hāladhārege boḍuṁbāḷalli Adidēvara bāḷa gaḍiya vivara mūḍa
ṟagiya haḍavaḷana kaṁbaḷa gadde paḍuva kāḍu
Digital edition of SII 7.368 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
